name: Curried Sauce for Turkey or Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 each Apple; Peeled and Cored, Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic, onion, and apple. Cook for about 5 minutes or until the vegetables are softened.
3. Stir in the curry powder and cook for an additional minute.
4. Gradually whisk in the flour, then slowly stir in the chicken broth and cream.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve the sauce over cooked sliced turkey or chicken.
Makes 2 cups of sauce.
